affinity_cookie_ttl_sec.description: Specifies the duration, in seconds, for which the affinity cookie is valid, applicable only if session affinity is set to "GENERATED_COOKIE".

backend.description: Defines the backend resources for the regional backend service, specifying server groups or services to which requests are forwarded.
backend.type: list(object({balancing_mode: optional(string),capacity_scaler: optional(number),description: optional(string),failover: optional(bool),group: string,max_connections: optional(number),max_connections_per_endpoint: optional(number),max_connections_per_instance: optional(number),max_rate: optional(number),max_rate_per_endpoint: optional(number),max_rate_per_instance: optional(number),max_utilization: optional(number),custom_metrics: list(object({dry_run: bool,max_utilization: optional(number),name: string}))}))

cdn_policy.description: Configures Cloud CDN settings for the backend service, including caching and optimization policies; set to enable CDN functionality.
cdn_policy.type: list(object({cache_mode: optional(string),client_ttl: optional(number),default_ttl: optional(number),max_ttl: optional(number),negative_caching: optional(bool),serve_while_stale: optional(number),signed_url_cache_max_age_sec: optional(number),cache_key_policy: list(object({include_host: optional(bool),include_named_cookies: optional(list(string)),include_protocol: optional(bool),include_query_string: optional(bool),query_string_blacklist: optional(list(string)),query_string_whitelist: optional(list(string))})),negative_caching_policy: list(object({code: optional(number)}))}))

circuit_breakers.description: Configures thresholds and limits for circuit breaking, including maximum connections, pending requests, and retries, to control backend service overload behavior.

connection_draining_timeout_sec.description: Specifies the time, in seconds, to wait for existing connections to drain before removing instances from the backend service. Must be a positive integer.

consistent_hash.description: Defines settings for consistent hash load balancing, including parameters for determining the hash key.
consistent_hash.type: list(object({http_header_name: optional(string),minimum_ring_size: optional(number),http_cookie: list(object({name: optional(string),path: optional(string),ttl: list(object({nanos: optional(number),seconds: number}))}))}))

custom_metrics.description: Defines the custom metrics configuration for the backend service, specifying monitoring and reporting details for service performance.

description.description: Provides a human-readable explanation of the backend service's purpose or functionality.

enable_cdn.description: Determines whether Cloud CDN is enabled for the backend service; requires a valid HTTP/HTTPS protocol configuration.

failover_policy.description: Defines the failover policy configuration, specifying how traffic is directed to a backup backend service during failover scenarios; requires at least one failover backend.

health_checks.description: List of health check resource names to monitor the backend service's availability and health; must reference existing health checks in the same region.

iap.description: Enables Identity-Aware Proxy for the backend service; requires OAuth 2.0 client ID and secret.

ip_address_selection_policy.description: Determines the policy for selecting the IP address of backend instances; must match the backend's configuration.

load_balancing_scheme.description: Specifies the load balancing scheme, either INTERNAL or EXTERNAL, to determine how the backend service routes traffic.

locality_lb_policy.description: Specifies the load balancing policy for distributing traffic among backend instances within a region.

log_config.description: Configuration for enabling and managing logging for the backend service, including options for logging traffic.

name.description: Unique name of the regional backend service, required to be compliant with Google Cloud naming conventions and globally unique within the project.

network.description: Specifies the self-link of the network to which the backend service is connected; must be in the same project.

outlier_detection.description: Configuration for outlier detection to automatically remove unhealthy backend instances based on failure criteria.
outlier_detection.type: list(object({consecutive_errors: optional(number),consecutive_gateway_failure: optional(number),enforcing_consecutive_errors: optional(number),enforcing_consecutive_gateway_failure: optional(number),enforcing_success_rate: optional(number),max_ejection_percent: optional(number),success_rate_minimum_hosts: optional(number),success_rate_request_volume: optional(number),success_rate_stdev_factor: optional(number),base_ejection_time: list(object({nanos: optional(number),seconds: number})),interval: list(object({nanos: optional(number),seconds: number}))}))

port_name.description: Specifies the name of the port used by the backend service, matching the name defined in the backend's instance group or network endpoint group.

protocol.description: Defines the communication protocol used by the backend service, such as HTTP, HTTPS, or TCP.

session_affinity.description: Determines how traffic is distributed among backend instances based on session affinity settings; valid values include NONE, CLIENT_IP, CLIENT_IP_PROTO, or CLIENT_IP_PORT_PROTO.

strong_session_affinity_cookie.description: Specifies the name of the cookie used for enabling strong session affinity; must be set when session affinity is configured.
strong_session_affinity_cookie.type: list(object({name: optional(string),path: optional(string),ttl: list(object({nanos: optional(number),seconds: number}))}))

timeout_sec.description: Defines the timeout duration in seconds for requests sent to the backend service. Must be a positive integer.

timeouts.description: Defines the timeout durations for HTTP, HTTPS, and TCP connections in the backend service, ensuring proper configuration for request handling.
